Lord of the lOih from Lagna Is Saturn: he Is placed In the Navamsa
of Jupiter. The native Is employed In the leading bank, now nationalised.
The fact lhat the Sun and Mercury aspect the Lagna shows that it is a
commercial bank. The native is fully qualified with banking and commerce
degrees. Lord of the 10"' is placed in Makara. which denotes seaside;
actually h:e is employed at a seaport-town. The Sun is placed i'l the 1Q£h
from the loth; actually the father and son were employed i'l the same
bank. The 10~t~ is an airy sign. denoting that the native has to apply his
intelligence meticulously anticipating erratic business changes. The lot"
has the effect of four planets Aahu, Kuja (Mars). Kethu and Jupiter. This
means that he has to work among people of various castes and
nationaliti-es, Hindus. Parsees. Gujaraties. Goanese. etc.
